h5c575975gaedeg4aebg8876g56c87e7a06de: *As you approach your camp, the raucous celebrations have already begun.*
h9aed6dd5g9e21g4c3fgbb28g3ccee6737691: *But you are intercepted before you can join the party.*
h5f77191dgfaf4g4f00g9fc9gaad62537ea0c: As I feared - there is no place in your company for heroes. We want no part of this, or of you.
h63a51466g039dg475egb03cg0691a482d883: As I feared - there is no place in your company for a hero. I want no part of this, or of you.
hbb14dfadg5c3eg4f3fga7ceg97bcb208c450: | We won't stand for what you've done. Goodbye. |
h2116f301g042eg4bf0g92e2gb422972999e3: | I won't stand for what you've done. It is time to depart. Goodbye. |
h327cc880g3aebg401dgbf54g9fdd95faafff: | We won't stand for what you've done. Goodbye. |
hf5aac360g0f53g4f86g9bfcga356ad1b3809: | I won't stand for what you've done. It is time to depart. Goodbye. |
ha02f4b07g03fdg4157g9af1g8075383dbbc4: I didn't escape the hells to lose my soul to another evil. I can't be part of this anymore.
h6a2ad704g6af9g4940g80e3ge15e16015f1e: *Volo has fallen into the goblins' clutches again, and appears to be chronicling your misdeeds.*
hd5d95632g2ae4g4e50ga37bg2b09006d07e6: *The goblins praise the Absolute, but their celebrations also honour their leaders. Minthara - and you.*
h60b7081ege292g4ad9ga18dgc85a753116e3: You fought well. And so did these creatures, thanks to our leadership.
ha4564681g453fg44d4gb327g6413d424f452: When you tire of their company, come to me. Tonight, you are mine.
h4ede4c88gfda0g4badg9044gb743355f8609: If you tire of their company, come to me. I may have other uses for you yet.
h3a2ae750gca95g4380gb46dgcbd38146992e: *As you approach your camp, the raucous celebrations have already begun.*
hce242a3egb73eg4506ga90egdc0f556cd936: *Some of your companions have left... perhaps forever.*
hbbc77e08gf8f0g42b4gafc9g036a14645fca: *The goblins praise the Absolute, but their celebrations also honour their leaders - including you.*
